governingBody: Virginia corrections agencies and prison mailrooms
reasonSummary: The Virginia prison-ban record treats the book as excluded reading inside state custody, which shows how prison and mailroom censorship function as a government reading regime. The exported reason says: C1, C5, C6, D.
